reconNotes: securitySignals are passive heuristics (path, query names, status mix, Content-Type, channel). Not a verdict; validate manually. For Postman or Swagger, use the OpenAPI or Postman export buttons.

securityHeaders.permissions-policy: ch-ua-arch=*, ch-ua-bitness=*, ch-ua-full-version=*, ch-ua-full-version-list=*, ch-ua-model=*, ch-ua-wow64=*, ch-ua-form-factors=*, ch-ua-platform=*, ch-ua-platform-version=*

securityHeaders.access-control-allow-methods: GET, POST, PUT, OPTIONS, HEAD, PATCH, DELETE

securityHeaders.access-control-allow-headers: Access-Control-Allow-Origin, origin, content-Type, content-Length, accept-Encoding, x-Csrf-Token, authorization, x-Jwt-Token,X-Tt-Env
securityHeaders.access-control-allow-methods: POST, GET, OPTIONS, PUT, DELETE, UPDATE
